note: Checksums of the committed Blender-baked reference goldens + the Blender version they were baked with. test_blender_goldens.py verifies these WITHOUT Blender (non-skipping), so a no-Blender CI machine still catches drift/corruption of committed Blender output -- which the Blender parity gates (which SKIP without Blender) cannot. Re-bake + update this lock atomically when intentionally regenerating a golden.
